notes:
No hint provided. Found at least three distinct candidates with the pinyin 'Xinyao Guo' / 郭欣瑶, no way to disambiguate per Rule 2; no verified email surfaced for any of them. Char-match check + per-candidate analysis below.

CANDIDATE A — UNSW SPREE PhD (Xinyao 'Grace' Guo). HDR student under Dr Mahesh Suryawanshi at UNSW Sydney School of Photovoltaic and Renewable Energy Engineering; B.S. from Monash + Central South Univ; CSIRO Top-up scholarship; co-author on 2025 Small paper 'Electrocatalytic Upcycling of PET Waste...' (DOI 10.1002/smll.202506556, PMC12571221). Confirmed as student via Suryawanshi profile (https://research.unsw.edu.au/people/dr-mahesh-suryawanshi 'Currently supervising: Xinyao Guo (HDR)') and ResearchGate (https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Xinyao-Guo-5). However, surname Chinese character is NOT verified — Guo pinyin maps to 郭/国/过 and no UNSW page, paper, ORCID, or LinkedIn surfaces her hanzi. The only Xinyao-Guo LinkedIn carrying explicit hanzi (https://www.linkedin.com/in/%E6%AC%A3%E7%91%B6-%E9%83%AD-57a498214/, decoded '欣瑶-郭') describes a different person (PKU intern, Guizhou University background). Corresponding-author email on the PET paper is m.suryawnashi@unsw.edu.au (supervisor), not Xinyao. No personal email recovered. Per Rule 0/1 — char-match unverified, can't proceed.

CANDIDATE B — PKU AI4M intern (LinkedIn 欣瑶-郭). Surname char 郭 confirmed via LinkedIn URL hanzi. Studied at 贵州大学 (Guizhou University); intern at 北京大学国际数学研究中心 AI4M project group (Jun 2023–Jun 2024 / Apr 2024–present per snippets). LinkedIn behind auth wall — no email retrievable. No public arxiv / Scholar / GitHub / HF profile found. No last-30-day public activity surfaced. Per Rule 3 — fails activity bar.

CANDIDATE C — CSIT 国家奖学金 winner (https://www.csit.edu.cn/xsc/2025/0514/c580a48718/page.htm). Different person at 常熟理工学院; no email; not active in tech/AI.

GitHub `xinyaoguo` (id 38005803, created 2018, 1 repo, 0 followers, no name/bio) and `guoxinyao` (id 32842856, created 2017, 0 repos, no name/bio) are stale stub accounts — fail Rule 3.
